title: Knock Down the Snake Eyes!
overview: After botching another match, bowling club captain Mai struggles to keep the club fun for all of its members.

title: Lost, Outside the Spot
overview: The girls find themselves in the past facing immediate danger when a handsome young 'B' comes to their rescue.

title: Lean on Your Balance Line
overview: The girls deal with Suguri's eccentric sisters while brainstorming ways to get home without affecting history.

title: The Chaotic Big Four
overview: Mai forgets her promise and asks Sumomo to build a bowling lane while Rina wrestles with her inner struggles.

title: A Passing Hook Ball
overview: After losing her ball while testing out a "plan B" to get home, Nozomi starts to find common ground with Anzu.

title: Reverse Hook, Clear Across
overview: With bandits roaming nearby, the girls learn from their hosts about life and values in the Sengoku period.

title: Hold On to the Loft Ball
overview: The long-lost eldest sister Natsume unexpectedly returns home from her travels without her mysterious partner.

title: A Surprise Blind Score
overview: As they enjoy the hot spring and learn more about their hosts and each other, the girls uncover a new mystery.

title: Right in the Pocket Together
overview: The secret of the house is finally revealed and Mai suggests a way to decide which of the sisters gets to die.

title: What Do We Do? Split
overview: The girls return to their time and start learning about their Sengoku friends and the history of the region.

title: A Desperate Punch Out
overview: The girls devise a strategy to rescue their Sengoku friends and defeat Kagetoki without having to kill anyone.

title: A Farewell Turkey!
overview: "I wonder if you'll believe me. It was a mysterious, heartwarming, kind of sad, and very, very special time."
